title: demo-state.json
description: State machine for the Demo B2C Commerce 11-step orchestrator. Lives in the working dir, gitignored. Secrets are referenced by name, never stored in clear.

name.description: Display name of the demo client, e.g. 'Nnormal'

source_url.description: Public website used as branding + catalog source, e.g. 'https://www.nnormal.com'

shortcode.description: 8-char realm short code (BM -> Administration -> Site Development -> Salesforce Commerce API Settings)

organization_id.description: Organization ID shown on the same SCAPI Settings page, e.g. f_ecom_zzse_262. SLAS tenant_id is typically this without the f_ecom_ prefix.

site_id.description: Storefront site id created in BM (case-sensitive). Captured in step 2, not in the intake.

dw_json_path.description: Absolute path to the dw.json file used by b2c CLI (generated by step 1 intake, gitignored).

access_setup_done.description: True once step 4b (AM scopes + OCAPI Data Settings) verifies with 'b2c sites list' + 'b2c bm whoami'. Skips re-prompts on resumes.

tenant_id.description: SLAS tenant = the Organization ID at BM -> Administration -> Site Development -> Salesforce Commerce API Settings, usually without the f_ecom_ prefix (e.g. zzse_262)

client_id_secret.description: NAME of the SLAS client id env var — never the raw value. Default to the canonical SFN runtime key 'PUBLIC__app__commerce__api__clientId' so step 5's .env bootstrap matches what the SFN template reads at boot. Legacy 'SLAS_CLIENT_ID' is silently ignored by the runtime.

client_secret_secret.description: NAME of the SLAS client secret env var — never the raw value. Default to the canonical SFN runtime key 'COMMERCE_API_SLAS_SECRET'. Legacy 'SLAS_CLIENT_SECRET' causes 'Access token is invalid or revoked' at runtime even when raw curl succeeds.

secrets_file.description: Path (relative or absolute) to the gitignored env file written by step 1 that holds the raw SLAS client_id and client_secret under their canonical env-var names. Steps 4 and 5 source this file instead of re-prompting the user. Default: '.demo-secrets.env' in the demo working dir.

template_source.description: Where the SFN template comes from in step 5 (chosen by the user).

kind.description: official-latest = clone SalesforceCommerceCloud/storefront-next-template HEAD; git-ref = a specific repo URL + ref; local-path = reuse an existing local SFN repo

url.description: Git URL when kind=git-ref (defaults to the official template repo)

path.description: Existing local repo path when kind=local-path

target_repo_path.description: Local path where the SFN repo is cloned (output of step 5, input to 7/9)

mrt_project.description: Managed Runtime project slug for `npm run push`

mrt_environment.description: MRT environment slug (staging | production | preview). Optional — defaults to the project's default if not set.

mrt_credentials_ready.description: True once ~/.mobify is verified to contain {username, api_key}. Re-checked just before step 11.

skill.description: Sub-skill the master invokes for ia-owned steps

note.description: Free-form note (e.g. blocker reason, output path)
